stemHtml:
The crew of a transport jet aeroplane prepares a flight using the following data:

Dry Operating Mass: 35 058 kg
Maximum Zero Fuel Mass: 52 790 kg
Performance limited Take-off Mass: 61 875 kg
Performance limited Landing Mass: 53 871 kg

Take-off Fuel: 13 358 kg
Trip Fuel: 8900 kg

What is the Traffic Load (TL) available for this flight?
